PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Order and Consent Judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
